header.title: Tasks
header.subtitle: Manage SDD tasks grouped by project.
empty.title: No tasks
testsFailingPaused: Tests failing — paused for manual intervention
detail.specSuggestionsHelp: Click "Refine Spec" to edit, or "Continue as is" if the spec is sufficient.
detail.planReviewHelp: Review the plan. Click "Approve Plan" to continue to implementation, or "Re-plan" to regenerate.
detail.noSubtasks: No subtasks yet. Click refresh to fetch from PM.
detail.noPmCriteria: No PM criteria. Click refresh to fetch.
form.title: New SDD Task
form.warningPR: This task has an active PR (#{{prNumber}})
form.warningPRDetail: Code has already been implemented, tests written and a PR opened. Saving will reset the task to "Queued" and the agent will re-execute the full flow.
form.warningCompleted: This task has already been completed and approved
form.warningCompletedDetail: Saving will reopen the task and set it back to "Queued" for full re-execution.
form.specSuggestions: Agent suggestions to refine the spec
form.placeholderTitle: e.g. Auth module with JWT + refresh tokens
form.placeholderSpec:
Required functionality,
endpoints / components,
validations, integrations,
technical constraints...
form.placeholderCriteria:
Unit tests with >80% coverage
Meets project coding standards
IA Reviewer passes without Critical/High
Code documentation
form.criteriaHelp: One criterion per line. The agent validates them before commit.
form.criteriaAsTextHint: Criteria are plain text. Convert to a trackable checklist?
confirm.deleteMessage: Task "{{title}}" will be deleted. Associated agent logs and runs are preserved. This action cannot be undone.
bulkImport.title: Import from PM
bulkImport.selectProjectHint: Select a project to load its PM requirements
bulkImport.pickItemsHint: Select the items to import as tasks
bulkImport.noPmProjects: No projects have a PM plugin active. Activate a PM plugin in a project first.
bulkImport.noItems: No pending items found (already imported items are excluded)
